meta.title: Awa | Ambassadors
meta.description: Awa was rescued from a facility that has received numerous USDA citations based on violations of the Animal Welfare Act.

data.name: Awa
data.story: Awa was rescued from a facility that has received numerous USDA citations based on violations of the Animal Welfare Act.
data.mission: She is an ambassador for educating people about responsible pet ownership, the historic persecution of wolves by humans, and the importance of wolves as keystone species in their ecosystems.
